paywall.heading:
Jouw persoonlijke plan
begint hier
paywall.trialDescription:
Probeer alles 7 dagen gratis.
Op elk moment opzegbaar. Geen risico.
paywall.skipText: Nee bedankt, doorgaan met beperkte functies
paywall.legalText: Annuleer wanneer je wilt tijdens de proefperiode. Abonnement verlengt automatisch.
paywall.testimonialQuote: “I lost 22 lbs in 3 months. The plan was easy to follow and I never felt hungry.”
paywall.feature21DaySub: Dagelijkse doelen die echte, blijvende gewoontes opbouwen
paywall.testimonial1: I didn't realise how much I was eating until this app broke it down. The AI scans are insane.
paywall.testimonial2: The daily challenges kept me motivated. Best investment I made.
paywall.testimonial3: Honestly just started to see what I was eating. Now I'm 3 months in and don't want to stop.
paywall.testimonial4: I've tried every tracker. This is the first one that didn't feel like homework. The camera is magic.
paywall.testimonial5: The 21-day structure actually worked. I built a real habit without even thinking about it.
paywall.testimonial6: My relationship with food completely changed. I finally understand what I'm eating.

welcome.heading:

zonder te raden
welcome.subheading: Ontvang binnen 2 minuten een plan dat bij je past
